error_signature: The item has no binary field ‘data’
title: Missing binary field in Decompress node
symptom: When using the Decompress node, an error occurs stating 'The item has no binary field ‘data’'. This prevents the workflow from processing the compressed file.
applies_when: Input binary field is incorrectly set
not_this_if: Input binary field is correctly set to 'attachment_0'
root_cause: The Decompress node expects the binary data to be in a specific field named 'attachment_0'. If the field is incorrectly named 'data', the node cannot find the necessary input to perform the decompression.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the Decompress node
Change the input binary field from 'data' to 'attachment_0'
agent_instruction: Change the input binary field in the Decompress node to 'attachment_0'.
